sqlMap.select: select * from EnvironmentalSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into EnvironmentalSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsApplUseIndepContractor IsApplRenderLiabForCleanupExp IsApplRenderEnvLaws IsApplRecomEnvAudits IsApplRefOfEnvConsultant IsCleintRespForEngagementRisks IsApplInterpretEnvCompAudits IsClientsDiscloseEnvLiability IsClientFinedForViolatingStateFedLaws ApplicantUsed LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsApplUseIndepContractor# #IsApplRenderLiabForCleanupExp# #IsApplRenderEnvLaws# #IsApplRecomEnvAudits# #IsApplRefOfEnvConsultant# #IsCleintRespForEngagementRisks# #IsApplInterpretEnvCompAudits# #IsClientsDiscloseEnvLiability# #IsClientFinedForViolatingStateFedLaws# #ApplicantUsed# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select IsApplUseIndepContractor, IsApplRenderLiabForCleanupExp, IsApplRenderEnvLaws, IsApplRecomEnvAudits, IsApplRefOfEnvConsultant, IsCleintRespForEngagementRisks, IsApplInterpretEnvCompAudits, IsClientsDiscloseEnvLiability, IsClientFinedForViolatingStateFedLaws, ApplicantUsed, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from EnvironmentalSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update EnvironmentalSuppLW set
IsApplUseIndepContractor = #IsApplUseIndepContractor# IsApplUseIndepContractor = null IsApplRenderLiabForCleanupExp = #IsApplRenderLiabForCleanupExp# IsApplRenderLiabForCleanupExp = null IsApplRenderEnvLaws = #IsApplRenderEnvLaws# IsApplRenderEnvLaws = null IsApplRecomEnvAudits = #IsApplRecomEnvAudits# IsApplRecomEnvAudits = null IsApplRefOfEnvConsultant = #IsApplRefOfEnvConsultant# IsApplRefOfEnvConsultant = null IsCleintRespForEngagementRisks = #IsCleintRespForEngagementRisks# IsCleintRespForEngagementRisks = null IsApplInterpretEnvCompAudits = #IsApplInterpretEnvCompAudits# IsApplInterpretEnvCompAudits = null IsClientsDiscloseEnvLiability = #IsClientsDiscloseEnvLiability# IsClientsDiscloseEnvLiability = null IsClientFinedForViolatingStateFedLaws = #IsClientFinedForViolatingStateFedLaws# IsClientFinedForViolatingStateFedLaws = null ApplicantUsed = #ApplicantUsed# ApplicantUsed = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from EnvironmentalSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from EnvironmentalSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select IsApplUseIndepContractor, IsApplRenderLiabForCleanupExp, IsApplRenderEnvLaws, IsApplRecomEnvAudits, IsApplRefOfEnvConsultant, IsCleintRespForEngagementRisks, IsApplInterpretEnvCompAudits, IsClientsDiscloseEnvLiability, IsClientFinedForViolatingStateFedLaws, ApplicantUsed, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from EnvironmentalSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsApplUseIndepContractor, IsApplRenderLiabForCleanupExp, IsApplRenderEnvLaws, IsApplRecomEnvAudits, IsApplRefOfEnvConsultant, IsCleintRespForEngagementRisks, IsApplInterpretEnvCompAudits, IsClientsDiscloseEnvLiability, IsClientFinedForViolatingStateFedLaws, ApplicantUsed, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from EnvironmentalSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
